methodology.anchors: 90-100 market leader · 70-89 strong/production-ready · 50-69 usable but gappy · 30-49 weak/indirect · 0-29 unsupported. Community is log-scale (~16M npm/week → 95; 100k → 70; 1k → 35; <500 → 15-25). CLI scenario favors installable tools; libraries are scored on suitability for building one. Unmeasured performance scores are architecture-based estimates.
methodology.provenance: Competitor criterion scores carried from p.md (verified with sources 2026-07-14) — no material changes since. Mastra scored fresh 2026-07-20 (was missing from the 2026-07-14 panel). Deuz re-scored from scratch against shipped 1.7.0 code. Community numbers re-fetched live 2026-07-20 (npm downloads API + GitHub API + PyPI).

kimi-cli.note: moonshotai PyPI; CLI installed via uv

scores.name: Mastra

criteria.chatbot: F74 D74 P60 C80 E82 $82 — strong agent layer (fallback chains, networks, approvals, memory pkgs) but chat UI rides the AI SDK integration; no own wire/hook protocol
criteria.cli: F60 D72 P58 C80 E80 $80 — no agent CLI product; heavy Node deps (116 MB measured)
criteria.coding: F55 D68 P60 C80 E76 $78 — no coding-agent toolset; strong loops/approvals
criteria.asi: F82 D74 P62 C80 E82 $78 — workflow snapshots (storage adapters), approvals, fallback chains, CostGuardProcessor, observability platform
criteria.agi: F74 D74 P58 C80 E84 $80 — 600+ model router; memory/RAG as separate packages + storage; no own speech/realtime

scores.note: NEW in this panel (missed by the 2026-07-14 sweep)

criteria.chatbot: F88 D76 P86 C22 E86 $92 — 1.7: resumable wire v2, ChatStore, typed data parts+validation, tool state, citations, loop memory, cost part, budget, signed approvals, durable×resumable endpoint, failover, useChat v2 + 2 headless components. Missing: Vue/Svelte, component catalog, speech, provider breadth, smoothStream. Community 336 npm/wk + 2 stars — the anchor is merciless.
criteria.cli: F67 D70 P84 C22 E82 $90 — still no CLI product (1.8 scope); failover/breaker help CLI backends. Bundle grew 2.4→3.5 MB with 1.7 features (import FASTER: 26.7 ms).
criteria.coding: F53 D60 P84 C22 E72 $88 — no fs/shell/git tool set yet; building blocks (loop, HMAC, durable, MCP, SKILL.md) strong.
criteria.asi: F90 D66 P85 C22 E90 $86 — strongest scenario: checkpoint/resume + wire-log resume compose, cross-session memory in the loop, budget guardrail, signed approvals E2E, live breaker, ObserveEvent/JSONL.
criteria.agi: F67 D70 P86 C22 E87 $90 — no breadth features in 1.7 (no speech/rerank/swarm); data parts/citations/failover marginal gains.

notes: Self-assessed by the Deuz maintainers — rubric, criterion breakdowns and sources published for scrutiny; re-derive any score from the anchors.
Deuz community criterion is ONE number (22) applied to every scenario: 336 npm downloads/week + 2 GitHub stars, fetched live 2026-07-20.

Sources for the 2026-07-20 updates: mastra.ai/models (fallback chains), mastra.ai/reference/processors/cost-guard-processor, docs.langchain.com/oss/javascript/langchain/middleware/built-in (modelFallbackMiddleware), docs.langchain.com/langsmith/streaming, openai.github.io/openai-agents-js/guides/models (same-model retry only). Older claims: p.md source list (2026-07-14).
